en: Does your company have a policy that addresses the Migratory Bird Protection Act/Bald & Golden Eagle Protection Act?
Please upload a copy of your company's policy:
Does your company's Migratory Bird Protection Act/Bald & Golden Eagle Protection  Act policy address the following:\n\nStop Work Process?
Process for notifying the tower owner?
Policy for when birds/nests are present?
Policy for all bird types protected under the Migratory Bird Act?
Stop Work Process if Eagles, Eaglets or nests are observed?
Safe work process for working around migratory Birds, nest, etc. when work has been approved?
